blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,323 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
